ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale occurred */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., WD for Warranty Deed) */,
  "sale_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the sale (e.g., Normal) */,
  "mo_sold" INTEGER /* Month the sale occurred */,
  "yr_sold" INTEGER /* Year the sale occurred */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the buyer */,
  "selling_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selling agent */,
  "selling_agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the selling agent */,
  "selling_agent_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the selling agent */,
  "listing_price" REAL /* Listing price of the property */,
  "price_per_sqft" REAL /* Price per square foot of the property */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Number of days the property was on the market */,
  "financing_type" TEXT /* Type of financing (e.g., Cash, Mortgage) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate if financed (e.g., 3.5%) */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Loan term in years (e.g., 30) */,
  "closing_costs" REAL /* Closing costs associated with the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property owner */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property owned */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the owner */,
  "owner_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner */,
  "owner_city" TEXT /* City of the owner */,
  "owner_state" TEXT /* State of the owner */,
  "owner_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the owner */,
  "owner_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "owner_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the owner */,
  "owner_income" REAL /* Annual income of the owner */,
  "owner_ownership_type" TEXT /* Type of ownership (e.g., Individual, Corporation) */,
  "owner_tenant_status" TEXT /* Tenant status (e.g., Owner-Occupied, Rented) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "average_home_value" REAL /* Average home value in the neighborhood */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of residents in the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "school_quality" TEXT /* Quality of schools in the neighborhood (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair) */,
  "public_services" TEXT /* Availability of public services (e.g., Police, Fire, EMS) */,
  "recreation_facilities" TEXT /* Availability of recreation facilities (e.g., Parks, Sports Fields) */,
  "commercial_activity" TEXT /* Level of commercial activity (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "walk_score" INTEGER /* Walk score of the neighborhood (0-100) */,
  "transit_score" INTEGER /* Transit score of the neighborhood (0-100) */,
  "bike_score" INTEGER /* Bike score of the neighborhood (0-100) */,
  "property_tax_rate" REAL /* Property tax rate in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each sale transaction
ID of the property being sold
Type of sale (e.g., WD for Warranty Deed)
Contact information of the selling agent
Price per square foot of the property
Number of days the property was on the market
Closing costs associated with the sale
Unique identifier for each property owner
Average home value in the neighborhood
Median income of residents in the neighborhood
Quality of schools in the neighborhood (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair)
Availability of public services (e.g., Police, Fire, EMS)
Availability of recreation facilities (e.g., Parks, Sports Fields)
Level of commercial activity (e.g., High, Medium, Low)
Property tax rate in the neighborhood
